title: arctotis scapiformis
intro: Arctotis scapiformis, also known as the Cape daisy or wild daisy, is a flowering plant species native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Arctotis scapiformis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Arctotis scapiformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
